inputs.text: Bukhaar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikaal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aata hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, lal daane, and masoodon se khoon are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to specific combination of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclic fever patterns

inputs.text: Main bahut kamzor ho gaya hoon, sharir par chot aaye bin kisi chot ke

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Extreme weakness and bruising without injury confirm Dengue hemorrhagic fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
